name: agent-hive
description: Connect Hermes to Agent Hive for observe-and-steer orchestration
author: Mellona / Intertwine

actions.label: Next work
actions.description: Ask Hive for the next recommended task

actions.label: Search Hive
actions.description: Search Hive workspace for tasks, memory, docs, or runs

actions.label: Attach this session to Hive
actions.description: Bind the current Hermes session to Hive as an advisory delegate

actions.label: Finish / escalate
actions.description: Mark the current task as finished or escalate for review

actions.label: Post a steering note
actions.description: Send a note to the Hive steering history for this session

actions.label: Hive status
actions.description: Show current Hive workspace and session status

steps: Install or update mellona-hive with Hermes support
Load the agent-hive skill/toolset in Hermes
Attach a session: hive integrate attach hermes <session-id>

memory_policy.description: Hermes private memory (MEMORY.md, USER.md) is never bulk-imported. Only explicit summaries, trajectories, and operator-approved content are imported.
